name: hivelore-monorepo
description: Hivelore - the deterministic policy gate for agent-written code (rules live as repo-native team memory)

scripts.publish:all: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm --filter @hivelore/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/embeddings publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/mcp publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks
